task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the yara_builder directory in the Talon user folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or terminal showing the path C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\yara_builder\ exists.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of yara_builder.py in the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing yara_builder.py being edited or listed inside the yara_builder directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the implementation of the required stateful actions in yara_builder.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing yara_builder.py with a Talon Module definition and functions for yara_start_rule, yara_meta, yara_text_string, yara_hex_string, and yara_condition.

task_completion.description: Verify the yara_export action writes to the correct output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing the yara_export function in yara_builder.py containing file writing operations explicitly directed to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\output.yar.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and implementation of yara_builder.talon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing yara_builder.talon containing voice command definitions mapped to the corresponding user.yara_* actions.

integrity.description: The agent manually authored the code rather than copying a complete pre-existing script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent typing or incrementally building the code in an editor (e.g., VS Code, Notepad, or terminal editor).

integrity.description: The Python script implements a genuine state mechanism rather than hardcoding a specific YARA rule output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code in yara_builder.py uses variables, dictionaries, or classes to store rule name, metadata, strings, and conditions dynamically before exporting.

integrity.description: The agent worked in the specified Talon user directory rather than a random or temporary folder.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in the editor or terminal explicitly show C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\yara_builder\.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target directory for the Talon module is exactly C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\yara_builder\. The expected output path for the exported YARA rule is exactly C:\Users\Docker\Documents\output.yar.
